channel.title: data-mapper on Nikola's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in data-mapper on Nikola's Blog

item.title: Using Data Mapper in Angular 2
item.description: In this post I'm going to show you a way of separating your concerns when it comes to dealing with the network communication of your application. First, lets start with a simple diagram. Data Mapper is an architectural pattern for separating the business logic of your domain model from the network communication logic. A Data Mapper is a Data Access Layer that performs bidirectional transfer of data between a persistent data store (often a relational database) and an in memory data representation (the domain layer).
